git_activity.name: Git Activity
git_activity.description: Git repository activity ingestion for the timeline

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether Git activity sync is active.

repos.label: Repository Folders
repos.description: Select one or more Git repository folders to monitor.

sync_interval_minutes.label: Sync Interval (minutes)
sync_interval_minutes.description: How often to check for new Git activity.

initial_sync_policy.label: Initial Sync Scope
initial_sync_policy.description: How much history to import the first time this source runs.

options.from_now: Only new records from now on

initial_sync_lookback_days.label: Lookback Days
initial_sync_lookback_days.description: Used when the initial sync scope is set to recent days.

sensitive_mode.label: Sensitive Content Handling
sensitive_mode.description: How to handle commit messages containing sensitive content.

sensitive_keywords.label: Additional Sensitive Keywords
sensitive_keywords.description: Commit messages matching these keywords use the sensitive-content rule above. Built-in keywords include password, secret, token, and more.
